_comment: Ranker-regression expectations over data/seed.json + data/cooccurrence.json. CHARACTERIZATION values (what the deterministic engine currently produces at the default 'wow with evidence' gate), not hand-picked winners. Update deliberately when the seed graph, co-occurrence, or scoring changes, and record why in an ADR. Phase-2 (ADR 0006): results rank by wow = surprise x trust and are gated at trust >= 0.50, so tight, well-evidenced connections win (Roman Empire -> Mithra in 4 sourced hops; Zoroastrianism -> Qin Shi Huang, the First Emperor of China) instead of long low-trust rambles. All default results are confident (possibly = false).
